template_notice: FAIL-CLOSED: replace every placeholder from real provider/output data. Empty sources can never pass postflight.
project_hash_semantics: SHA-256 of semantic canonical JSON: sorted compact UTF-8, integral floats and negative zero normalized; not a hash of whitespace bytes

source_record_schema.shot_id: exact shot_id from the producer JSON
source_record_schema.prompt: exact prompt submitted to the image model

settings.seed: integer or null when provider does not expose it

source_record_schema.job_id: real provider job ID or documented local generation ID
source_record_schema.output_sha256: real lowercase SHA-256 of output bytes

attempt_history.prompt: exact prompt submitted in this attempt
attempt_history.model: exact provider/model version used in this attempt
reference_hashes: hashes actually submitted in this attempt
real SHA-256 for every submitted reference
